source_sequence: other-benchmarks/raw/hotpotqa/hotpot_dev_distractor_v1.json#5a76dc2d55429972597f13eb:Now That's What I Call Music! 59 (U.S. series)
reasoning_chain_text: 1. Identify which song on the 59th U.S. edition of Now That's What I Call Music is credited to the relevant Australian recording artist.
2. Confirm that song was written and recorded by the Australian recording artist, then return the song.
original_final_question: What song included on the 59th edition of Now That's What I Call Music was written and recorded by an Australian recording artist? Write your answer as [ANSWER].
original_reasoning_chain: Node 1: Which song on the 59th U.S. edition of Now That's What I Call Music is credited to Sia? Evidence: Now That's What I Call Music! 59 (U.S. series): 59 is the 59th edition of the "Now! " by Justin Timberlake, "Cheap Thrills" by Sia featuring Sean Paul, and "Panda" by Desiigner. -> Cheap Thrills

Node 2: Which Sia song was recorded by an Australian recording artist and written by Sia and Greg Kurstin? Evidence: Cheap Thrills (song): "Cheap Thrills" is a song recorded by Australian recording artist Sia for her seventh studio album, "This Is Acting" (2016). It was written by Sia and Greg Kurstin, while solely produced by Kurstin. -> "Cheap Thrills" by Sia
